title: Udon Prison Breaks Under Luffy’s Will
description: On pages 15–17, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Luffy, Queen, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15 as Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
scene: Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It makes no sense for possible allies to stand in the way of that!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: ...So make up your minds right now!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Will you follow us... or Kaido!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Will you still... Give us another chance...!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He has gripped their wavering hearts... what amazing leader- ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is bad. He's pulling on their heartstrings...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but he's wide open right now... if I shoot 7H/S into that crowd...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'll cause a giant uproar and the tides will swing back in our favour!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With 200 times the viruses within the excitement bullets...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey!! old maid's planning to shoot some- thing at us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I saw a slightly dangerous future, so...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I'm leaving the rest to you guys.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't you guys remember what'll happen to you if you go against the warden!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 8 DAYS BEFORE THE FINAL BITTLE... WITHOUT THE ENEMY'S KNOWLEDGE...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You have brought us a very power- FUL ally, Kim Emon!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon Liberation storyline with 38 dialogue beats. Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
